Suzanne needs to make french toast on Saturdays and Sundays. Each day, she and her husband have 1 slice, and her daughters split 1 slice, totaling 3 slices per day. Over 52 weeks, she will make 6 slices per weekend, leading to 312 slices total. Since each loaf contains 12 slices, she will need 26 loaves of bread.  

***  

Roberto hikes a trail that is 5 miles long. 60% of the trail is uphill, and 40% is downhill. He travels uphill at 2 MPH and downhill at 3 MPH. The uphill portion is 3 miles, taking 1.5 hours, which is 90 minutes. The downhill portion is 2 miles, taking 2/3 hours, which is 40 minutes. In total, it takes him 130 minutes to complete the hike.  

[address] is a placeholder for the location where the hike takes place. [time] is a placeholder for the time Roberto spends hiking. [amount] is a placeholder for the cost of the drinks. [sandwich] is a placeholder for the cost of each sandwich.
